name: 诗歌朗读与创作
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 语言表达 / Language / Language Arts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to explore and identify simple patterns of sound (e.g., rhyme, rhythm, repetition) in age-appropriate poems (K-2).
Students will be able to compose original poetic pieces using figurative language and deliberate structural choices to express personal ideas and emotions (3-5).

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
